# Sued for Debt? -- How to Respond & Defend [2026] -- Debtcollectionlawsuit
> Being sued for debt? Learn how to respond, raise defenses, and avoid default judgment. Step-by-step 2026 guide for debt collection...

## About
debtcollectionlawsuit.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Sued for Debt? -- How to Respond & Defend [2026] -- Debtcollectionlawsuit: https://debtcollectionlawsuit.org/

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
